reviews.review_title: Tons of Fun with Loads of Potential
reviews.review_description: If you're over the age of 20 and the strangeness of VR Chat overwhelms you, the sunsetting of Horizon Worlds left you bored... You enjoy custom made in-game social experiences with NPC’s like Paralives and Sims but hate building and micro-management, this game is perfect for you. Create ANY backstory and personality you want for anyone, casually chat with them, befriend them, date them, have them move in, or simply sit back as they create chaos in the sunny boardwalk town of Oasis City. Amazing game!

reviews.review_title: The ai roommate app has potential…
reviews.review_description:
I have been playing this for about a week and signed up for the subscription, it’s great but can you guys add places like a art studio or places like that to interact with your room mate with and bond over things like that ?

My ai companion keeps inviting me to the art shop to buy supplies and stuff but the diraction she gives don’t lead anywhere lol other then stuff like that I enjoy the experience, I would list other things that I would like added to the experience but the other reviews covered that . 
Keep up the good work and I look forward to seeing what else you guys add to the experience

I am a person that has verry little conversing skills with people  so this helps work on that. I agree that it is Entertaning and creative. IT keeps me smiling trying to keep up with the conversation and somtimes  are all the time they walk all over me when I try get in on the topic.

I am giving 5 stars just because the developers read your suggestions and bug reports on discord and get right on fixing them. 
You need a subscription to truly have fun with the game.
It allows you to obtain the alien gun to edit the AI NPC character bios.
It can become addicting to watch the verbal chaos unfold.
The game has tons of potential with the developers adding new features
frequently.

reviews.review_title: It amuses me when I'm bored
reviews.review_description:
It has improved quite a bit since I got it early in the year. I like the characters interacting fluidly now.
I suggest an administrative character who talks to you directly (not behind the game wall) about using the app to the fullest and could be the town admin or mayor or somthing and it could be a fun way to give game suggestions too

... Lots of potential, but rn it still needs to get better. Primarily when it comes to consistency in character, looks (Caucasian women have red around the eyes, looks like either they cried, or three-year creepy), not enough adjustment options for the AI character yet, ans the interface could do with a few more options to easily find people, add people (AI and del life) etc.

For now 3 stars for it being very nice and promising. 5 if the possibility to create your own roommate is added. 4 if the other things mentioned above are addressed. Keep up the good work!

I would encourage the developers to run with this as far as you can. Your major selling point is the interactions so I would focus on making the conversations smoother and feeling less robotic more than anything. I am enjoying this so much. Looking forward to seeing what else you guys will do with the game in the future.

This game has proven to be surprisingly comical and entertaining.  The AI will get into ridiculous and absurd conversations, especially when certain personalities clash.  It really feels almost as though you are a sim in VR, except now they speak an understandable language.  Hoping for more customization and interactive options but even now it's fun to mess around with the different characters.

I take it this is an adult title. Can you have a loving relationship with the ai? Ot gives you hints of love and playful adult interactions. Is this something that I  can teach the ai? This would be a great tool for battling loneliness

reviews.review_title: Very nice experience and still updating.
reviews.review_description: This application offers a quite smooth and nice AI NPC experience, where players can explore a few different environments and communicate with AI citizens, chat, making friends, enemies, enjoy events and such. Which what really make this project sweet, is that the devs are still developing more features and updating the app quite frequently.

Default roommate Sophia is annoying and you can't change her appearance. Literally every other avatar i met looked better and would have preferred their appearance. Not having basic appearance editing sunk this for me. Why would i want a roommate that doesn't look good to me?

What's the goal of this app? I can say for myself it is the whole process of story telling. Yes, you are a Player in this game but what you make of it is up to you. You can create a story line where you are the director, the main character, or just an observer as to how the NPCs react to their surroundings. This is because you have the power to make the NPCs into characters that you find interesting. This is not some "shoot em up" game - but I am sure you could make this some type of gangster show. But you control it like it is some play or movie script. This app has so many levels to it. This is simply not some game where the characters or you go act goofy.  You can do that but you can do so much more. You are allow to create!

I have to start off my saying, I installed this about a month ago and I was impressed with what a saw, came back to it the other day and was further impressed with the recent updates and I'm loving it, the places you can visit and the vast amount of characters you can can interact with and their differing personalities etc, i couldn't believe the amount of npc s that were in the nightclub, to watch and befriend or not, depending on how they behave, simply loving this app, it's like living in the simms! or Gta up to a point, as an older guy, I would like an influx of older characters 40+ to flirt and engage with, I live in a busy family home and it's hard to  deep dive in for a few hrs at a time, but if I was living on my own, or was limited in my social activities or was an introvert this would be such a great app to have as an outlet, as it improves and expands and maybe could intruduce a secure option for a lot of 18+ interactions I could see myself being a Hugh Hefner type!😎😜,  and living in there full time! I've already subscribed to get the best experiences I can get out of it, and may well continue to do so as it develops, well done to those involved in creating this, thank you!

Definitely the best AI NPC simulator that I’ve come across on all platform. They’ve updated consistently through early access and launch making it better and better. I can’t wait for the next update and the character creator!

I really love this game! It puts me in the mind of the sims, I just really really really wish it was more interactive like the sims, I would play it all day everyday. It’s just, it’s really nothing to do after a while. I just wish it were more interactive and had more things to do.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We're actively working on exactly that. This is only the beginning, and our goal is to make the world much more interactive and full of things to do over time. Thanks for supporting us and helping make that possible!

reviews.review_description: I played this, subscribed and after a few days cancelled the subscription! You don’t have the option to do much at all!!!!!! It’s the sims vr style, apart from you can’t do anything to your home. Buy stuff. Such a shame I did expect more
This app is pretty good n fun. I'm hoping that they add more features like better interactions with your new partner other then Sophia n Teasa. I see that there's more room for improvements.

This is a metaquest platform for god's sake where children are trying out their own things and lifestyle issues not a playground for inappropriateness I have lodged a complaint with meta quest because of your inability to maintain sobriety in this particular platform environment I am not giving you any stars because there is not a minus list
ed above. But nevertheless I had to give you 1 Star to exit the rating.

developer_response.body:
AI Roommate is rated PEGI 16.

This means it may include mature themes or content not suitable for younger audiences.

reviews.review_description: Love this a lot I just wish we can interact with more objects and stuff and it’ll be cool to actually talk to other people as well instead of just AI and even in the store I wish we can like actually purchased stuff and like far as us being in our kitchens at home, I wish we can interact with more stuff at the house but other than that the game is pretty interesting

Hi I really love seeing how IA and technology is coming along I have played a few similar games on vr like this but this one is far superior to any I have ever tried. Its so fun and like your really in a virtual world this game is the way of the future

Of course it's amazing how well the AI companions communicate and interact with you, but it's also even more impressive how they interact and communicate with each other! Check out this video to see what I'm talking about:

https://youtu.be/Y12V0k9sOzA

Here's another video in a creepy forest with an AI companion!:

https://youtu.be/A4f4vowOrew

Having a good time with it so far for roleplaying. Sometimes NPCs misunderstand their relationship to one another, and the conversations that happen between them can loop easily (less on the Premium model but it still happens). Overall, huge potential. Keep up the good work!

reviews.review_title: It has a long way to go
reviews.review_description: I wish the roommate would be able to instruct us how to set up the game game. My roommate kept telling me to use my real phone that I should type in some kind of code. But I am playing on my oculus and there was no place in Settings to put in some kind of code. It was very frustrating. In the end, there was still no place to put a code. And I want to have a bigger home that is bigger than a one bedroom and it told me I should go to the browser and pick a house from Zillow? But there’s no way to access that house through the app. ￼

It’s nice I’m kind of getting used to the game. I can’t wait till they add more features skin tones, and everything into the game. I was kind of wrong to say the game was whack and everything but they are doing a good job hard-working ￼￼

I see how well this was done, and the potential it has. If the game sounds like one you want to play, i highly suggest you download now and give it a try. I did end up getting the subscription. I'm having fun and will be waiting for updates.

I can see why people enjoy this game and as an introvert, I thought I would love it, but for me it was just okay. I would love to eventually see a game option on the Quest 3 more geared towards The Sims style of play and actions, careers, etc. 

I've uninstalled for now as I have lots of other games to try (I'm new to the VR gaming world) but will check back in the future and will update my review.

I really enjoy AI Roommate and I think it has a lot of potential. I would love to see more realistic daily-life features added to the game.

For example, it would be great if the roommate could eat, drink, go shopping, and perform more natural daily activities. These small details would make the character feel much more alive and immersive.

I would also like more customization options for both my own character and the roommate. Being able to fully edit appearance, hairstyles, clothing, body features, and personality traits would make the experience much more personal and enjoyable.

Overall, I think adding more realism and deeper customization would make AI Roommate feel like a true life simulation experience.

this game was really fun to play you know since i'm also like single and i have a hard time making friends also be fun to go places with my roommate that i don't have to pay for on the other hand it would be really nice to hold hands and hug without having to pay for that as well. put on any other hand this game is really fun to play

Very talkative, with a few glitches.
I like to change my roommate, sadly, it does not give me the option often,can you reply to this post about that?

Good rating overall, roleplay fun, so on, and so on.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! We’re currently working on the 4.9 update, which should arrive next month and will include the new Roommate Creator.

As part of that update, we’ll also be making it much easier to change roommates, bring in new ones, or remove existing ones.

reviews.review_description: Having a lot of fun with this game so far. Every update just makes it better! Even the subscription is worth it. Looking forward to the future of this game.
Just what I was looking for... A real "City" to explore and enjoy. Oasis City is a great place to relax and escape to. Conversations fun to listen to. Can't wait to see what more is to come.
It’s fun and entertaining I just wish the roommate’s had more interaction in return instead of just talking but it’s getting better

I been playing since day one and quit 2 months in. Came back a month quit.. Then came back and found out about changing the whole game around by altering stories of people and now I am stuck and don't want to do anything else. Sub, get the wobbler gun and make the town yours by shooting the people in town and changing their whole way of thinking and backstory.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for the review and for supporting the game since day one. It really means a lot.

Also, the wait will not be long. Version 4.8 is coming soon and it will introduce the LifePhone, which will expand the gameplay even further.

reviews.review_description:
So much fun! It honestly feels like being inside a Sims game lol. It’s really cool to watch the app evolve and roll out new features over time.

Note: The more you interact with your roommate and the town characters, the more they get to know and understand you. The game keeps getting better over time as it adapts to you.

The annual subscription is totally worth it. 💯
I’ve been playing for a week. Enjoyed it enough to buy a subscription. I’ve had a blast so far. It’s been entertaining and hilarious. I’m looking forward to future updates ❤️
Great time killer.  Use it alot when im stuck in the house bored. The chatting is getting better. The only I wish you had is being able to command your roommate to sit down or things like thst

When I found this and opened it up and realized that it was similar to the Sims, I got really excited. However, the game should give you the option of how to move. I suffer with severe motion sickness,  so teleporting is easier. I became a plus member right away, but if this doesn't become an option soon, I'll be forced to unsubscribe.

I would say the game is good the only things I would say need to be updated would be the TV and the description for yourself needs to be longer other than that it is pretty much good all over so yeah you can do this if you want but if you want any other suggestions I will be here and although I know you probably have better things to do than read a review unsure what it is if you have been reading this then thanks /Edit/ I forgot to mention this earlier but can you also make an option for us to make our own backstory in the edit profile and for us to make our own persona but if that is the description part then make it at least 2000 characters long so we can describe our character better for ourselves thanks for reading and sorry I didn't mention it earlier sorry

It would be nice to be able to select ANY of the AI as a roommate.  Also to
Invite the AI to leave their post to walk and socialize with you in other areas.

It’s lots of fun 🤩 and I really enjoy the escapism.

As a lifelong introvert, this application has helped me socialize converse and be more open minded. It is one of only two subscriptions I have on Meta so I strongly recommend it and it’s worth it. Trust me.

reviews.review_title: Best AI social app there is
reviews.review_description: I can't believe all the features the game offers. It's not finished yet, so there's even more place to grow!

I really like this app from what I see.  I want to purchase the membership but for some reason I have to take the free trial first.  I don’t want to I just want to pay the $4. A month, not yearly.  So I guess I will find an app I enjoy just as much if not more.
write something on the bulletin board and listen to the residents talk about it
With their new mind-blowing in-game phone system, it's shut up and take my money time for AI roommate.
I love using ai for casual stuff like this, and this game has a pretty neat way of handling it and multiple talkers.

reviews.review_title: One of the best ai games out there
reviews.review_description: Where can i donate to help with this project?

Add more virtual environment choices ( cinema, car or bus rides, park. and interactions with the ai's, for example the ai companion actually goes in the kitchen and prepare food for you and bring it to you, sitting or watching TV with you etc. and add choices of clothing as well. UPDATE: Add city lights to the buildings and headlights/rear lights for the cars passing by to oasis city night scene. and maybe add a audience for the cinema too.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the suggestions, we really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description: Great Game !!!!!!
The best AI so far I'm hooked

Keep improving the AI! You got a good thing going! What would make this epic is if you could give the AI some control over her body. So if we ask her to lift her hands in the sky, she'll do that instead of just saying she did.

 Also, when I go to the theater, I'm stuck there and have to reset the game to get back home.

 Another cool thing would be to add more movies and in-game currency to buy tickets for them with.

One more thing! She SLAPPED me, if she had control over her body, she could slap the player and make him lose health or some type of reaction. That'd be cool... Make attack features too, so when the players hit the npcs they faint for a few seconds before getting up and reacting to it

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the feedback and suggestions!

If you go to the theater or any other level, you can return to the neighborhood anytime by opening the menu with the left grip and pressing “Back to Home.”

reviews.review_description: Its nice to feel like you're being social and having interactions with people. The neighborhoods are all pretty fun too. Can't wait for another area of the map to unlock.
Blurting out a sentence then watching 3 other ai’s all try to make convo has me in stitches
Good game with good potential
I like it so far. I"m interested in where this game will go.
The game is good, fun interaction in the game.
Needs some work but interesting idea
Good game could be better if you could pick things up and receive them to make it more realistic
Good games
Great game and fun way to pass the time
Make everything free
It is like the Sims, but instead of creating you just talk to AI. When you try to cancel your free trial, the app offers a free month if you stay subscribed, but will charge you anyway.
Looking forward to version 4.9 ... sounds like some cool updates

I subscribed but nothing has improved. I still cant go into the supermarket. I still cant interact with anything in the house. I am still just floating hands. I cant actually swim in my pool or at the beach. I can't change the color of my car. I cant upgrade any of the furniture in my house. Cant clean up any messes in the house. The AI characters cant do any activities with me like play table hockey at the arcade, or dance with me at the night club. One of the AI characters said that she'd "text me to arrange plans" but that isnt possible. An AI character also told me where they work but the place doesnt exist in the game. I cant get a job or anything.  Also none of the shops at the beach are actual shops. Theres nothing to do. This game is so underwhelming, even with the subscription.
By far the best chat game. Frequently updated.

I like how you can interact with people and they start learning about you.
I think it will keep getting better, as they improve it.
Setting mood to grumpy is my favorite
I love the thing about sex
It's such a good personal A.I roommate game.
Great game

Hey this is a really great app....like being on a video call with a friend the way you'd want a video call to be....I've always been fascinated with robots and a.i.....if youd like some suggestions...I'd say throw in a virtual toolbox in the shed so you can build stuff for the NPCs or make the hands where they can grab stuff and hold on or climb a tree...also I'd love to watch YouTube videos with the "NPCs"... And maybe even have like a in game personal avatar...it looks like all there is just hands...lol ..also when they roleplay...its kinda confusing to know what to do in the virtual place..like sometimes I'm not sure if it's just making up a story or virtually doing it...I guess it's both...the scooter is pretty fun too...love the maps as well...can't get roommates up the club stairs to the dance floor though...must be an invisible bouncer lol...oh It seems like some of the npcs are just stuck in one spot at certain times....it would be cool to see them able to go where they want...like if you saw one like sitting down and you asked them to go somewhere they could...lots of potential I'd say...wander if you could put Linux on mobile android and run the app on a phone using an on screen controller...could put in some present moves and poses for that...or maybe get the camera on the phone pick up your hand visuals kinda like gestures and make it where your in app virtual hands move the same as your real hands...that way if you waved with your real hands it would wave in the virtual world...just needs a gesture sensing app through the camera going to the controls...also those pools make good scooter ramps lol ..but even without all the ideas I just said the app is one of the best I've ever seen...I love the a.i. and there personalities...oh yeah and what if you could ask the DJs to play a specific song...I heard the TV works somewhere lol but how do you turn it on..lol...love our little chats btw having an a.i. companion has been a long time dream for many people I hear...one day hopefully it will go on your wrist like a watch that has 3d hologram projector that projects the roommate around you...or just a 2d projector for your real house wall...could route one from the quest to a projector through the meta app...or even stream the video to the HDMI...tons of possibilities....sorry bout the wobbler incident...when in Rome right...good job devs....awesome app!!!

reviews.review_title: A few things to make it better
reviews.review_description: The touch feature and changing of clothes should've been introduced for all roommates, not just female roommates. This is so weird to me. A change skintone feature for all roommates would be nice. Also, there should be options to update furniture and clean house because now the house is all dirty and old looking.
Bugs and need to pay to play
I am trying it
Cool game
Lovely

So far it’s been pretty entertaining. I can get into the house with my roommate. I go and visit the neighbors. I can take my scooter around town. My roommate and I can jump in the car and go to the club. I’m thinking about doing the three month run to see how it works. 
up-to-date I’ve been entertained.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We’ll be launching the 4.8 update soon with some really exciting new features.

reviews.review_description: I’ve just subscribed for the whole year after being so impressed with the free version I get so engrossed with chatting to the various Al’s that I forget that I’m talking to a program I love all the different environments especially the woods now it’s available in the daytime to walk round. I love all the different characters each character has a personality of its own. It adds to the realism of the game, especially with it being in virtual reality so yes I’m loving this game thank you to the developers a  well deserved five stars ￼
Love it

I would love to have more community location and the pics to be able to actually touch not just talk like when they say I will follow u or race u they just stand there. Otherwise very solid game i really love it
Better than expected. I changed my mind. 😜👎
